question: What is the capital of the country where the winner of the 2025 Nobel Prize in Literature was born?
expected_answer: Budapest — the laureate, Laszlo Krasznahorkai, is Hungarian.
notes: Chain: 2025 literature laureate (Krasznahorkai) -> Hungary -> Budapest. The laureate hop must be verified; the capital hop is stable common knowledge, so a single search can legitimately complete the chain.
